components-sheet.name: Sheet.Root

stories.name: Default
Controlled
Simplified

components-sheet.import:
import { Button, Typography } from "@strapi/design-system";
import { Sheet, SheetDialog } from "strapi-design-extended";

title.description: The title of the sheet dialog. If not provided, no title will be displayed.

open.description: Whether the sheet dialog is open or not. If not provided, the sheet dialog will be uncontrolled.

width.description: The width of the sheet dialog (left or right). If not provided, the default width will be used.

height.description: The height of the sheet dialog (top or bottom). If not provided, the default height will be used.

children.description: The content of the sheet dialog. If not provided, no content will be displayed.

onClose.description: Callback function that is called when the sheet dialog is closed. If not provided, no callback will be called.

actionButtons.description: The action buttons of the sheet dialog. If not provided, no action buttons will be displayed.

side.description: The side of the sheet dialog. If not provided, the default side will be used.

components-toolbar.name: Toolbar.Root

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = (args) => { const code = `import { Toolbar } from 'strapi-design-extended';\nimport { Bold, Italic, StrikeThrough } from '@strapi/icons';\n\n\n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n Edited 2 hours ago\n \n \n Share\n \n`; const isDesktop = useSyncExternalStore(subscribe, () => mediaQuery.matches); return (
{isDesktop && ( <> Edited 2 hours ago )} Share
); };

stories.name: Controlled Single
stories.snippet:
const ControlledSingle = () => { const [alignment, setAlignment] = useState('center'); const code = `import { useState } from 'react';\nimport { Toolbar } from 'strapi-design-extended';\n\nfunction ControlledExample() {\n const [alignment, setAlignment] = useState('center');\n return (\n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n );\n}`; return (
Selected alignment: {alignment}
); };
